sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْمَنْسَفُ الْأُرْدُنِيُّ مِنَ الْأَطْبَاقِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ الْعَرِيقَةِ الَّتِي تَحْظَى بِمَكَانَةٍ خَاصَّةٍ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ الْكُبْرَى.
sentences.translation: Jordanski mansaf se smatra jednim od drevnih tradicionalnih jela koja uživaju poseban status u velikim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: Jordanian Mansaf is considered one of the ancient traditional dishes that holds a special status on major occasions.

sentences.arabic: يَتَكَوَّنُ هَذَا الطَّبَقُ بِشَكْلٍ أَسَاسِيٍّ مِنْ لَحْمِ الضَّأْنِ الْمَطْهُوِّ بِلَبَنِ الْجَمِيدِ، وَهُوَ نَوْعٌ مِنَ اللَّبَنِ الْمُجَفَّفِ الَّذِي يُعْطِي نَكْهَةً حَامِضَةً وَفَرِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: Ovo jelo se uglavnom sastoji od janjetine kuhane u 'jamidu', vrsti sušenog jogurta koji daje kiselkast i jedinstven ukus.
sentences.translationEn: This dish primarily consists of lamb cooked in 'jameed', a type of dried yogurt that provides a sour and unique flavor.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدَّمُ اللَّحْمُ فَوْقَ طَبَقَةٍ كَثِيفَةٍ مِنَ الْأُرْزِ الْأَصْفَرِ الْمَوْضُوعِ عَلَى خُبْزِ "الشِّرَاكِ" الرَّقِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Meso se poslužuje na bogatom sloju žute riže postavljenom na tanki 'shrak' hljeb.
sentences.translationEn: The meat is served over a thick layer of yellow rice placed on thin 'shrak' bread.

sentences.arabic: يُزَيَّنُ الْمَنْسَفُ بِاللَّوْزِ وَالصَّنَوْبَرِ الْمُحَمَّصِ، وَيُرَشُّ عَلَيْهِ الْبَقْدُونِسُ الْمَفْرُومُ لِإِضْفَاءِ لَمْسَةٍ مِنَ الِانْتِعَاشِ.
sentences.translation: Mansaf se ukrašava pečenim bademima i pinjolima, te se posipa sjeckanim peršunom radi svježine.
sentences.translationEn: Mansaf is garnished with roasted almonds and pine nuts, and sprinkled with chopped parsley to add a touch of freshness.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَنَاوُلَ الْمَنْسَفِ بِالْيَدِ الْيُمْنَى يُعَدُّ جُزْءًا مِنَ التَّقَالِيدِ الَّتِي تُعَزِّزُ الشُّعُورَ بِالْأُلْفَةِ وَالْمُشَارَكَةِ بَيْنَ الْحَاضِرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Jedenje mansafa desnom rukom smatra se dijelom tradicije koja jača osjećaj bliskosti i dijeljenja među prisutnima.
sentences.translationEn: Eating Mansaf with the right hand is considered part of the traditions that enhance the sense of intimacy and sharing among those present.
